final:
module RefModule(
    input               clk         ,
    input               rst_n       ,
    input       [31:0]  data_in1    ,
    input       [31:0]  data_in2    ,

    output  reg [31:0]  data_out
);

    // Bitwise XOR operation
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            data_out <= 0;
        end else begin
            data_out <= data_in1 ^ data_in2;
        end
    end

endmodule
